title: 13 风格篇：100 句学术句式 + 去 Chinglish 化
content:
## 一、中式英语 12 个典型陷阱

中国学生写英文 paper 最常见的错误：

### 1. realize ≠ 实现
- ❌ *We realize a new model.*
- ✓ *We implement a new model.* / *We propose a new model.*
- *realize* 在英语里更多指 "意识到"

### 2. propose 用太多
- 一篇 paper 通常只 propose 1 次（abstract 第一次）
- 后续可以用 *introduce / present / develop / design / put forth*

### 3. will 在 abstract 是大忌
- ❌ *In this paper, we will show that...*
- ✓ *In this paper, we show that...*
- 学术写作用一般现在时叙述 "完成的事实"

### 4. it / this 指代不清
- ❌ *...the model converges. **It** improves performance.*（it 指 model 还是 converges？）
- ✓ *...the model converges. **This convergence** improves performance.*

### 5. very / many / good 太弱
- ❌ *Our method is very good with many advantages.*
- ✓ *Our method significantly improves accuracy with three key advantages.*

### 6. however 滥用
- 不要每段开头都 however
- 替换：*In contrast,* / *Nevertheless,* / *Yet,* / *On the other hand,* / *That said,*

### 7. 中式比较
- ❌ *Our method is more better than baseline.*
- ✓ *Our method outperforms the baseline by X%.*

### 8. 双重否定
- ❌ *It is not impossible to...*
- ✓ *It is feasible to...*

### 9. 长句滥用
- 中式英语容易写 50 词的长句
- 学术英语单句平均 18-22 词。每超过 30 词的句子都应该被切成两句

### 10. "等等" 滥用
- ❌ *...such as A, B, C, etc.*
- ✓ 直接列举完整的，或用 *including A, B, and C*
- *etc.* 在学术写作中显得偷懒

### 11. 不合理的 "the"
- ❌ *the convergence behavior is good*
- ✓ *convergence behavior is good*（抽象概念前面不加 the）
- ✓ *the convergence of this model is fast*（具体所指要加 the）

### 12. *paper* 用法
- ❌ *In this **paper, we** propose...*（OK 但单调）
- ✓ *We propose...*（更直接）
- 一篇 paper 里 "In this paper" 出现 ≤ 3 次

## 二、100 个高分句式（背下来）

### A. 开头句式（20 个）

1. *To this end, we propose...*
2. *In this paper, we address the problem of...*
3. *Recent advances in X have demonstrated...*
4. *Despite recent progress, X remains an open challenge.*
5. *Building on the success of X, we introduce...*
6. *In contrast to prior work, our approach...*
7. *While X has been extensively studied, Y has received less attention.*
8. *Motivated by X, we develop Y.*
9. *This paper takes a step toward...*
10. *We hypothesize that X enables Y.*
11. *Recent work has shown promise in X...*
12. *A central challenge in X is...*
13. *The core question we ask is...*
14. *To bridge this gap, we propose...*
15. *Our work is motivated by the observation that...*
16. *We revisit X from a new perspective...*
17. *Our key insight is that...*
18. *We argue that X requires Y...*
19. *Inspired by X, we propose Y...*
20. *We rethink X by introducing Y...*

### B. 承接句式（20 个）

21. *Empirically, we observe that...*
22. *Specifically, our model...*
23. *More formally, ...*
24. *To better understand this, ...*
25. *Crucially, ...*
26. *Notably, ...*
27. *Interestingly, ...*
28. *In particular, ...*
29. *For instance, ...*
30. *As shown in Figure X, ...*
31. *On closer inspection, ...*
32. *We note that...*
33. *It is worth highlighting that...*
34. *Importantly, ...*
35. *Concretely, ...*
36. *To illustrate, ...*
37. *More generally, ...*
38. *In other words, ...*
39. *That said, ...*
40. *On the other hand, ...*

### C. 实验描述（20 个）

41. *Our experiments demonstrate that...*
42. *The results in Table X show...*
43. *We achieve state-of-the-art performance on...*
44. *Our method outperforms baselines by X%.*
45. *The ablation study reveals that...*
46. *Removing component X drops performance by Y%.*
47. *We attribute this improvement to...*
48. *Surprisingly, ...*
49. *Counterintuitively, ...*
50. *This finding aligns with our hypothesis.*
51. *We trained the model for X epochs on Y dataset.*
52. *We followed the standard protocol of [Z et al.].*
53. *All experiments are run on X GPUs over Y seeds.*
54. *Standard deviation is computed over Y runs.*
55. *Statistical significance is verified by paired t-test (p < 0.01).*
56. *We compare against the strongest open-source baseline...*
57. *Performance saturates at X% as we scale data...*
58. *The model exhibits emergent behavior at X parameters...*
59. *Our gain is most pronounced on hard subset Y...*
60. *We confirm the trend reported in [X et al.].*

### D. 反驳与局限（20 个）

61. *While X performs well on Y, it fails on Z.*
62. *This limitation arises because...*
63. *We acknowledge that our method does not address...*
64. *A potential concern is that...*
65. *However, our analysis shows...*
66. *Despite this limitation, our approach...*
67. *Future work could explore...*
68. *Extending to X is left as future work.*
69. *The current implementation requires...*
70. *Trade-offs between A and B remain to be explored.*
71. *We caveat that...*
72. *One subtle issue is...*
73. *This raises the question of...*
74. *We refrain from claiming X because...*
75. *Our results should be interpreted in light of Y.*
76. *We acknowledge an open question:...*
77. *A natural extension would be...*
78. *We do not claim X, but rather Y.*
79. *Our scope is limited to...*
80. *Failure analysis reveals...*

### E. 结论与展望（20 个）

81. *In summary, ...*
82. *To conclude, ...*
83. *Our work opens up new directions in...*
84. *We hope this paper inspires future research on...*
85. *This work contributes to the broader goal of...*
86. *The implications of our findings extend beyond...*
87. *More broadly, ...*
88. *This is, to our knowledge, the first attempt to...*
89. *We believe X holds promise for...*
90. *Finally, we anticipate that...*
91. *Our contribution can be summarized as...*
92. *The key takeaway is...*
93. *We envision this approach being applied to...*
94. *Looking forward, ...*
95. *Beyond X, our framework naturally extends to...*
96. *We see this as a step towards...*
97. *Our results call for further investigation into...*
98. *We anticipate fruitful directions in...*
99. *Building on this work, future studies could...*
100. *In conclusion, X enables Y by Z.*

## 三、内化方法

### 3.1 三周计划

- **第 1 周**：把这 100 句打印出来贴墙上
- **第 2 周**：每周选 5 句，在自己写的 README / blog / paper draft 里强制使用
- **第 3 周开始**：渐渐自然出现

4-6 个月后这些句式会自然出现在你的写作中，不需要刻意。

### 3.2 替换练习

每天写一段 200 字的 paper draft 或 README，强制使用 5 个上面的句式。一周 35 句，2 周 70 句，3 周复习 100 句完整一遍。

## 四、避免「翻译式写作」的根本方法

中式英语的根源是 "用中文打草稿再翻译"。终结这个习惯的方法：

### 4.1 直接用英文打草稿

哪怕语法不通也要用英文。**不要中文先写**。

### 4.2 用 Grammarly / DeepL Write 修语法

不是让 AI 重写你的句子，而是修语法 + 提建议。

### 4.3 用 GPT / Claude 让它「批评」你的写作（不是让它写）

例：你写完一段后问 GPT：

```
"Critique the following abstract for clarity, conciseness, and
academic style. Identify three weakest sentences and suggest
rewrites. Do not write a full new abstract — only critique."

[paste your abstract]
```

这比让 GPT 直接写好 100 倍——你保留了 voice，AI 只做诊断。

### 4.4 阅读量决定上限

每天读 1 篇 arXiv，每月 30 篇，一年 365 篇。**这是任何写作训练都无法替代的输入量**。

## 五、同义词词典（高频替换）

| 想说 | 推荐用 | 避免 |
|---|---|---|
| 重要 | crucial / pivotal / central | very important |
| 显示 | show / demonstrate / reveal / indicate | display |
| 提出 | propose / introduce / present | put forward |
| 改进 | improve / enhance / refine | make better |
| 性能 | performance / accuracy / precision | speed |
| 数据 | data / dataset / corpus | data is（**data 是复数**） |
| 模型 | model / framework / architecture | algorithm（特定情况） |
| 实验 | experiment / evaluation / benchmark | test |
| 表明 | suggest / indicate / imply | mean |
| 因此 | therefore / consequently / hence | so |
| 然而 | however / nonetheless / yet | but（口语化） |
| 尽管 | despite / although / while | though（少用） |

## 六、长句拆分技巧

中式英语第一大病是长句。拆分技巧：

### 原句（45 词）

> *We propose a new method that uses object-centric slot attention with persistent address vectors and time-varying content vectors which separates the identity of objects from their appearance to improve the robustness of vision-language-action models under scene shifts.*

### 拆为 3 句（更清晰）

> *We propose OA-WAM, a new VLA architecture using object-centric slots. Each slot has a persistent address vector and a time-varying content vector. This separation of identity from appearance improves robustness under scene shifts.*

### 拆分原则

- **每句一个意思**
- **超过 25 词就考虑拆**
- 用句号代替 "which / that / and"
- 用主动语态代替被动

## 七、被动 vs 主动

英语学术写作正经历从「被动」到「主动」的转变：

| 时代 | 风格 | 例 |
|---|---|---|
| 1990s 之前 | 被动为主 | *It is shown that X is achieved.* |
| 2000-2010 | 混合 | *We show that X is achieved.* |
| 2020+ | 主动为主 | *We show X.* / *Our model achieves X.* |

新一代 reviewer（< 40 岁）对被动语态非常反感。**用主动语态**：

- ❌ *It is observed that the model converges faster.*
- ✓ *We observe that the model converges faster.*
- ✓ *The model converges faster.*

## 八、最终目标

3 个月后能做到：

- ✅ 写一份 GitHub README，用 1 小时（不是 5 小时）
- ✅ 不用翻译软件，直接用英文打草稿
- ✅ 100 个句式会自然出现 30-40 个
- ✅ Reviewer 不会觉得 "这是中国人写的"
- ✅ Native 同事 review 你的 paper 时，主要 comment 是 idea 而不是 grammar

这就是这个模块的终点。
